_comment: OpenClaw (MCPorter) registration for the DCF mesh agent skill. Merge the
path to where this repo lives, give a distinct DCF_AGENT_NODE_ID, point DCF_PEERS
at your partner agent's host:port, and share DCF_CHANNEL. This is the exact shape
port/id); for the shared HTTP service use `--transport http` (npx mcp-remote URL).
